title: Incorrect Document Name
summary: Document was expected to be named 'readme', but found 'readme1.pdf'.

title: Internal Representation
summary: The internal representation is mentioned only at a high level: the text says parsing produces an AST, but it does not explain the AST's node organization, what information individual nodes carry, or how later semantic and XML phases consume that structure.

anchors.snippet: Po úspešnej syntaktickej analýze je vygenerovaný AST, ktorý reprezentuje hierarchickú štruktúru programu v jazyku SOL25.

judge.rationale: This is a real insufficiency, but the issue is specifically the shallow AST description rather than a total absence of internal-representation discussion.
judge.reasoning_chain: Most punctuation findings are false positives because the PDF page images do not show the extracted-text spacing artefacts before commas, colons, or periods; the rendered document appears typographically normal in those places. Several content findings about missing architectural depth are valid, but some need narrowing because the document does provide at least a basic execution flow, semantic-phase structure, and one explicitly named design pattern.

before.summary: The internal representation is described only superficially as an AST, without deeper explanation of node structure, stored metadata, ownership, traversal assumptions, or how semantic information is represented.
before.snippet: Po úspešnej syntaktickej analýze je vygenerovaný AST, ktorý reprezentuje hierarchickú štruktúru programu v jazyku SOL25 .

title: Internal Representation
summary: This mentions internal structures only vaguely and does not explain their architecture, contents, relationships, or role in later phases.

title: Internal Representation

title: Design Patterns Missing or Insufficient
summary: The document names and briefly explains the Visitor pattern, but its design-pattern discussion is incomplete: it does not clearly distinguish which items are actual design patterns versus general OOP principles, and it gives only limited justification of how the chosen pattern(s) support extensibility across the architecture.

judge.rationale: There is a real weakness, but not a complete absence of pattern discussion because Visitor is explicitly named and briefly motivated.

title: Extensibility
summary: The text claims extensibility but provides no concrete examples of future changes the architecture supports, and fewer than two specific extensions are described.

anchors.snippet: Implementovaný parser predstavuje komplexné riešenie spracovania jazyka SOL25 s dôrazom na modulárny a rozšíriteľný objektovo orientovaný návrh.

judge.rationale: The conclusion claims the design is modular and extensible but gives no concrete future extension scenarios, let alone two specific examples.
